languages.text: {n}Сенешаль откашливается и оправляет мундир.{/n} "Пред вами {mf|Его|Ее} Светлость {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, наследни{mf|к|ца} величайшего протектората {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Простора Коронус{/g} и держатель{mf||ница} священного {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Патента{/g}".

{n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}."
languages.original_text: {n}Сенешаль откашливается и оправляет мундир.{/n} "Пред вами {mf|Его|Ее} Светлость {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, наследни{mf|к|ца} величайшего протектората {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Простора Коронус{/g} и держатель{mf||ница} священного {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Патента{/g}".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}.

{n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}.

{n}The Seneschal clears his throat, adjusts his uniform, and addresses the soldiers:{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}. In recognition of your aid in battle, the Lord Captain will forgive your breach of protocol and failure to show deference to rank, Sergeant."

{n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}.

{n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}."

languages.text: {n}執事長が喉を鳴らして、制服を整え、兵士たちに語りかける:{/n}「貴方は、{mf|殿|女殿} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}ローグ・トレーダー{/g} {name}・フォン・ヴァランキウス卿、{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}コロナス・エクスパンス{/g}で最も偉大な保護領の相続人であり、聖なる{g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}貿易令状{/g}の保持者である御前に立っています。戦場で貴方の助けに感謝し、殿は貴方の規律違反と階級への敬意の欠如を許します」
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, adjusts his uniform, and addresses the soldiers:{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}. In recognition of your aid in battle, the Lord Captain will forgive your breach of protocol and failure to show deference to rank, Sergeant."

languages.text: {n}Seneşal, boğazını temizleyip üniformasını düzeltiyor.{/n} Şu anda {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Enginliği'ndeki{/g} en büyük protektoranın vârisi ve kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Ticari Ruhsatname'nin{/g} Hamili olan {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Hür Tacir{/g} {mf|Lord|Leydi} {name} von Valancius Hazretleri'nin huzurundasınız.
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}.

traits.locale_text: {n}Seneşal, boğazını temizleyip üniformasını düzeltiyor.{/n} Şu anda {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Enginliği'ndeki{/g} en büyük protektoranın vârisi ve kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Ticari Ruhsatname'nin{/g} Hamili olan {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Hür Tacir{/g} {mf|Lord|Leydi} {name} von Valancius Hazretleri'nin huzurundasınız.

languages.text: {n}总领清了清嗓子并整理了一下制服。{/n}“站在你们面前的，是尊贵的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}行商浪人{/g}{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}科罗努斯扩区{/g}最伟大王朝的继承人，神圣{g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}贸易授状{/g}的持有者。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}.

traits.locale_text: {n}总领清了清嗓子并整理了一下制服。{/n}“站在你们面前的，是尊贵的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}行商浪人{/g}{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}科罗努斯扩区{/g}最伟大王朝的继承人，神圣{g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}贸易授状{/g}的持有者。”

languages.text: {n}Der Truchsess räuspert sich und rückt seine Uniform zurecht.{/n} "Ihr steht vor {mf|Seiner Lordschaft|Ihrer Ladyschaft}, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Freihändlerin{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} des mächtigsten Protektorats der {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus-Ausdehnung{/g} und {mf|Träger|Trägerin} des heiligen {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Handelsbriefs{/g}."
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Truchsess räuspert sich und rückt seine Uniform zurecht.{/n} "Ihr steht vor {mf|Seiner Lordschaft|Ihrer Ladyschaft}, {g|Encyclopedia:Freihändler}Freihändlerin{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} des mächtigsten Protektorats der {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus-Ausdehnung{/g} und {mf|Träger|Trägerin} des heiligen {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Handelsbriefs{/g}.

languages.text: {n}Le sénéchal s'éclaircit la gorge et ajuste son uniforme.{/n} « Vous êtes en présence de Sa Seigneurie {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}{mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|héritier|héritière} du plus grand protectorat des {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Étendues de Koronus{/g} et {mf|détenteur|détentrice} de la {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}lettre de marque{/g} sacrée. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}.

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sénéchal s'éclaircit la gorge et ajuste son uniforme.{/n} « Vous êtes en présence de Sa Seigneurie {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}{mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|héritier|héritière} du plus grand protectorat des {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Étendues de Koronus{/g} et {mf|détenteur|détentrice} de la {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}lettre de marque{/g} sacrée. »

languages.text: {n}El Senescal se aclara la garganta y se ajusta el uniforme.{/n} «Están en presencia de mi{mf|lord|lady} {name} von Valancius, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Comerciante Independiente{/g}, hereder{mf|o|a} al mayor protectorado de la {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Extensión de Koronus{/g} y poseedor{mf||a} de la sagrada {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Patente de Comercio{/g}».
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}.
